title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Securities - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Securities - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Securities in Indore is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Securities:
HDFC Securities is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities!
